data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of reporting and grouping by custom field values. However, the linked use case does not provide concrete evidence that this functionality is implemented or accessible via the API. The absence of specific endpoints or data structures that support reporting and grouping by custom fields indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or data structures supporting reporting and grouping by custom field values.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API endpoints for reporting and grouping
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API supports reporting and grouping by custom field values.
